goal: Add portable archive support for real-adapter evidence bundles so an external CUDA host can produce a verified tar.gz bundle and the local release gate can safely verify/promote that archive into canonical artifacts/review without weakening real-adapter, M6, or v0 acceptance policy.
head: a127d38
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add archive packaging/extraction support to evidence bundle tooling, update focused tests, regenerate the handoff command artifacts, refresh current NOT_GO v0 readiness, update WORKING.md, and update this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Bundle builder can emit a tar.gz archive containing only fixed verifier-required evidence files plus manifest/verification metadata
Promoter can verify/promote either a bundle directory or a safe tar.gz archive and rejects unsafe archive paths before extraction
Generated CUDA handoff records the portable archive output path but still requires GO_REAL_ADAPTER_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE before v0 readiness
Current local v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC and v0 remain NOT_GO until real trained CUDA adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.
This gate does not edit release review docs or verifier acceptance criteria.

phase_notes.plan: Add portable evidence bundle archive support for external CUDA host handoff.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed existing bundle builder/promoter only consume directories, which leaves manual copying friction for external CUDA-produced release evidence.
phase_notes.build: Add tar.gz archive creation and safe archive extraction paths without changing strict bundle verification policy.
phase_notes.check: Focused tests passed. Generated CUDA handoff includes --archive-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_evidence_bundle.tar.gz. v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker.
phase_notes.done: Phase verified. Stage, commit, and push are approved by the user phase policy; release readiness remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.

pabcd.approved_scope: Archive packaging/extraction support for real-adapter evidence bundle tooling, focused tests, generated handoff artifacts, refreshed NOT_GO v0 readiness, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
